description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the registry.gitlab.com/gitlab-org/release-cli:latest Docker image and defines a postrelease stage. Add a job named create GitLab Release entry that runs in the postrelease stage, sets a variable S3 to https://gitlab-docker-machine-downloads.s3.amazonaws.com/$CI_COMMIT_TAG, executes the script echo "Releasing to $S3/index.html", and uses the release keyword to publish a GitLab Release with tag name $CI_COMMIT_TAG, name $CI_COMMIT_TAG, ref $CI_COMMIT_TAG, description 'New release of GitLab's fork of Docker Machine is out!', and attaches asset links for macOS, Linux amd64, Linux arm, Linux arm64, OpenBSD, Windows binaries, checksum files and an index.html hosted on $S3. The job inherits rules from .rules:release:stable-or-rc so it only runs on stable or release‑candidate tags.
